name: Matrix — Research Design Decision Grid (2x2)
input: Create a 2x2 decision matrix for choosing research study design. Axes: Internal Validity (Low/High) vs External Validity (Low/High). Top-left (High Internal, Low External): Randomized Controlled Trial — Strong causality but limited generalizability. Top-right (High Internal, High External): Pragmatic Trial — Balances rigor and real-world relevance. Bottom-left (Low Internal, Low External): Case Report — Weakest evidence, hypothesis generating only. Bottom-right (Low Internal, High External): Cross-sectional Survey — Good representativeness but no causal inference.
qualityCriteria: Items present (RCT, Pragmatic Trial, Case Report, Cross-sectional)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Four quadrants labeled with study designs
napkinBenchmark: 2x2 grid with axis labels. Each quadrant contains study design name and brief description.

data.title: Research Design Decision Matrix

items.label: Randomized Controlled Trial
items.description: High internal validity, low external validity — strong causality but limited generalizability to real-world settings

items.label: Pragmatic Trial
items.description: High internal and external validity — balances methodological rigor with real-world clinical relevance

items.label: Case Report
items.description: Low internal and external validity — weakest evidence level, useful only for hypothesis generation

items.label: Cross-sectional Survey
items.description: Low internal validity, high external validity — good population representativeness but no causal inference possible

data.caption: Study design selection based on internal vs external validity trade-offs
